acet.title: Macroeconomic Policies Supporting Start-ups in Africa: A Case Study of Kenya
acet.excerpt: The government, via the CBK, has tried to boost credit flow to micro, small, and  medium enterprises through an SME Credit Guarantee Scheme launched in 2020 (especially to aid post- COVID recovery). acet.title: Macroeconomic Policies Supporting Start-ups in Africa
acet.excerpt: Traditional financial institutions often perceive  start-ups as high-risk borrowers, requiring substantial collateral and imposing stringent lending  conditions.
